chapter_title.en: The Reward for the Ziyārah of the Messenger of Allāh (s.a.a.w.)

parts.text: حَدَّثَنِي جَمَاعَةٌ مِنْ مَشَايِخِنَا بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ

text: قُلْتُ مَا لِمَنْ زَارَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ (ص) مُتَعَمِّداً قَالَ يُدْخِلُهُ اللَّهُ الْجَنَّةَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ

en.sayyid-mohsen-al-husayni-al-milani: 4. A group 0f our scholars narrated to me from Muḥammad ibn Yaḥyā, from Aḥmad ibn Muḥammad ibn ‘Isā, from Mu’āwiyah ibn Ḥukaym, from ‘Abdil Raḥmān ibn Abī Najrān, who said: I asked Abā Ja’far the Second (Imam Jawād (a.s.)), “What is the reward for those who go to the Ziyārah of the Messenger of Allāh (s.a.a.w.) solely for (the purpose of) Ziyārah?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “Allāh will take them to Paradise IN-SHĀ`ALLĀH.”
